title: amauropelta pleiophylla
intro: Amauropelta pleiophylla is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to New Zealand. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Amauropelta pleiophylla include its potential to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and dermatitis, as well as its ability to alleviate respiratory issues like bronchitis. Amauropelta pleiophylla can be prepared as an infusion or decoction for herbal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
